metaDescription: Accessible regenerative training programs for global changemakers — under $200, at any level.

learningCentral.metaDescription: Find the best learning path for your goals. Explore frameworks, traditions, skills and curated training programs.
learningCentral.what: What do you want to learn?
learningCentral.subtitle: Choose the path that matches your question, need, or next step.

metamodels.title: Frameworks and models
metamodels.desc: Conceptual models for understanding systems at different scales. Best for systems thinkers, strategists, and people seeking deeper grounding.
metamodels.goal: I want to understand complex systems and frameworks

traditions.title: Practices & Traditions
traditions.desc: Global wisdom traditions supporting community healing, ecological awareness and collective intelligence. Best for: those seeking embodied, relational or spiritual grounding.
traditions.goal: I want to learn from ancient and indigenous wisdom

skills.title: Regenerative Skills
skills.desc: Individual and collective capacities essential for systemic transformation, mapped across Wilber's 4 Quadrants and the 3 Horizons framework.
skills.goal: I want to build specific capabilities for change

patterns.title: Change Patterns
patterns.desc: Grassroots tactics and strategies for social transformation, filterable by scale, risk and context. Best for: activists, organizers and change agents ready to act.
patterns.goal: I want to find the right strategy for my situation

glossary.title: Glossary
glossary.desc: Shared language and definitions used across the Changemappers ecosystem — archetypes, system concepts and community vocabulary.
glossary.goal: I want to understand the terms and concepts used here

causes.title: Regenerative Development Goals
causes.desc: 30 interconnected goals across five domains — a systems-thinking framework for civilizational regeneration. Best for: anyone seeking a big-picture map of the change field.
causes.goal: I want to understand the landscape of global challenges

programs.title: Trainings & Programs
programs.desc: Accessible regenerative training programs — under $200, from 5 continents, no degree required. Best for: learners seeking structured, guided learning.
programs.goal: I want structured courses or training programs

stories.title: Stories
stories.desc: Open-source failures and breakthroughs from the field. Real accounts from changemakers navigating complex systems.
stories.goal: I want to learn from real-world experience and stories
